title: Kevin McAleenan Highlights BigBear.ai's Strong Financial Position in 2025 Financial Report
text: BigBear.ai CEO Kevin McAleenan highlighted the company's strong financial position in the 2025 financial report. At the start of 2025, management set out to transform the company's financial foundations to establish a base from which to accelerate in 2026, and they delivered exactly that. BigBear.ai reported $127.7 million in revenue in 2025 and expects to generate full-year revenue between $135 million and $165 million in 2026. The company achieved significant financial improvements by reducing debt by over 90% through the conversion of 2029 Convertible Notes to equity. BigBear.ai strengthened its balance sheet with $431.5 million in total available cash and investments. The company also completed the $250 million acquisition of Ask Sage, a generative AI platform serving defense and intelligence sectors, which is expected to contribute approximately $25 million in annual recurring revenue. McAleenan emphasized that the company has established the strongest financial position in its history, positioning it for accelerated growth and strategic investments in 2026.
